Barium Swallow 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/barium-swallow/ 
Barium Swallow 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a barium swallow? A barium swallow, also called an esophagogram, is an imaging test that checks for problems in your upper gastrointestinal (GI) tract. Your upper GI tract includes your:
Mouth 
Back of the throat 
Esophagus (the tube that carries food and liquids from your mouth to the stomach) 
Stomach 
Duodenum (first part of your small intestine)Â  A barium swallow test involves dri
